title: Sierra Chart Pricing Guide 2026: All Plans, Costs & Hidden Fees
meta_title: Sierra Chart Pricing Guide 2026: Plans, Costs & Fees
meta_description: Sierra Chart costs $26/mo (as of April 2026). All order flow tools included. No verified hidden fees. See our pricing guide for features, plans, and comparisons.
excerpt: Sierra Chart is $26/mo with all core features included. No verified hidden fees. See our 2026 pricing guide for plans, features, and alternatives.
content:
Table of Contents

  • Sierra Chart Overview
  • Sierra Chart Pricing Plans (2026)
  • Features Included in Each Plan
  • Hidden Fees & Extra Costs
  • Quick Comparison Table
  • Alternatives & Comparisons
  • Final Recommendation

Sierra Chart Overview

Sierra Chart is a professional-grade charting and trading platform, especially popular among futures scalpers, day traders, and systematic traders. It is known for its ultra-low latency, native C++ engine, and comprehensive order flow tools. For a detailed breakdown of its strengths and weaknesses, see our Sierra Chart review. Official details are available at the Sierra Chart website.

Sierra Chart Pricing Plans (2026)

As of April 2026, Sierra Chart offers a straightforward pricing model:

  • Standard Plan: $26 per month

This price includes all core charting and order flow features. There is no verified information about additional plan tiers or annual discounts. For the most current details, always refer to the official Sierra Chart pricing page.

Features Included in Each Plan

According to the latest data (April 2026), the $26/mo plan includes:

  • Fastest charting engine (native C++)
  • Numbers Bars (footprint), volume profiles, market depth heatmap
  • DOM ladder, time & sales
  • ACSIL C/C++ programming interface for custom studies and automation

All these features are included at the base price. For a full feature list, see the official Sierra Chart site.

Hidden Fees & Extra Costs

Based on verified data, Sierra Chart does not charge extra for order flow tools, DOM, or automation features—these are included in the $26/mo plan. However, the following limitations and potential costs should be considered:

  • Platform: Windows only. No native Mac, Linux, or web version. Running on other OS requires workarounds (Wine/VM), which may incur additional costs or complexity.
  • Mobile: No mobile app (iOS/Android) available.
  • Data Feeds: Pricing for market data feeds, brokerage integration, or exchange fees is not verified in the supplied data. Check the official source for current data feed costs.

Quick Comparison Table

Platform Rating Monthly Price Best For Order Flow Tools Automation OS Support
Sierra Chart 4.3/5 $26 Futures scalpers, day traders, systematic traders Included C/C++ (native) Windows only
Bookmap See review See review Order flow traders See review See review See review
eSignal See review See review Active traders See review See review See review
Koyfin Pro See review See review Financial analysts See review See review See review

For direct feature and price comparisons, see our Bookmap vs Sierra Chart, eSignal vs Sierra Chart, and Koyfin Pro vs Sierra Chart pages.

Alternatives & Comparisons

Sierra Chart stands out for its speed and value, but it is Windows-only and lacks a mobile app. If you need web or Mac support, or want to compare order flow tools, see our Bookmap vs Sierra Chart comparison and Sierra Chart review for alternatives. For broader charting needs, check eSignal vs Sierra Chart and Koyfin Pro vs Sierra Chart.

Final Recommendation

If you are a futures scalper, day trader, or systematic trader using Windows and want professional-grade order flow tools at a budget price, Sierra Chart's $26/mo plan is one of the best values available. All core features are included at this price, with no verified hidden fees for charting or automation. However, if you require Mac, Linux, web, or mobile support, or need verified details on data feed costs, consult the official Sierra Chart site before subscribing.
